Get in Touch

Let’s Talk

Have questions about selling your property at auction? Want to learn more before committing? Just reach out — Alex is happy to have an honest conversation about whether auction is the right fit.

Phone

alex@alexmillerauctions.com

Email

alex@alexmillerauctions.com

Service Area

Central Kansas — Wichita metro, Hutchinson, Salina, Great Bend & surrounding communities

Hours

Monday – Friday: 8am – 5pm
Weekends: By appointment

Prefer direct contact?

Email alex@alexmillerauctions.com for the fastest response. Social links will be added once confirmed.

Free Consultation

Tell Us About Your Property

No obligation. Alex will review your situation and give you an honest assessment of your options.

This site currently uses direct email instead of a third-party form service. Send your details and Alex can reply personally.

No spam. No pressure. Alex will respond personally.

Brokered by L2 Realty Inc. — Licensed Kansas Real Estate Brokerage

Alex Miller Real Estate Auctions

Alex Miller is a licensed real estate auctioneer serving central Kansas. Every auction is handled with transparency, professionalism, and a commitment to getting sellers the best possible outcome.
